name: BLS International Services Limited
summary: BLS International Services Limited provides outsourcing and administrative services for various diplomatic missions. The company offers tech enabled government to citizen services, such as national identification cards, verification and attestation, public, identity management, passport renewal, and e-passport application services; and visa processing services, including outsourced visa processing, verification of documents, attestation of documents, passport, e-visa, and other allied services. It also provides value added services comprising photocopy, courier services, internet facility, premium lounge, form filling, insurance, SMS alert, translation services, mobile biometric, prime time visa appointment, and walk-in without appointment services. The company operates in India, the Middle East, the Asia Pacific, North America, Europe, and South America. BLS International Services Limited was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
